SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.ds

Class ConnectionMetrics

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.ds.ConnectionMetrics
public class ConnectionMetrics extends Object
Represents metrics and statistics related to database connection usage.

Tracks information such as connection acquisition time, usage duration, active and idle connection counts, and error rates.

Useful for monitoring, diagnostics, and performance tuning of connection pools.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
